name: Mushroom, Dijon and Avocado Salad
recipeIngredient: salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard, vinegar, oil, shallots, salt, and pepper in a salad bowl.
2. Blend thoroughly with a wire whisk.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and blend again.
4. Peel the avocados and cut into halves.
5. Remove and discard the pits.
6. Cut the avocado into 1-inch cubes.
7. Add the avocado cubes and parsley to the salad bowl.
8. Toss gently until everything is well combined.
